pages.text: $(l)Identity$()$(br2)Ghost Players creates horror by making caves feel populated by things that look almost like other players.$(br2)$(l)Impression$()$(br2)Its fear comes from confusion. For a moment, the player is forced to wonder if somebody else is really there.

pages.title: Behavior
pages.text: $(l)Presence$()$(br2)Invisible shapes, player-like names, and false sightings do most of the work.$(br2)$(l)Fear Style$()$(br2)It turns normal mining into a paranoid check for movement and names.
